case_title: DAVID RUBINSTEIN VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ--LEGAL DEPT. MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
